mapper.select: select id, user_name as userName, title, workspace_id as workspaceId, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt from zephyr_conversations where user_name = #{userName} order by updated_at desc
mapper.insert: insert into zephyr_conversations (id, user_name, title, workspace_id, created_at, updated_at) values (#{id}, #{userName}, #{title}, #{workspaceId}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: update zephyr_conversations set title = #{title}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where id = #{id} and user_name = #{userName}
mapper.delete: delete from zephyr_conversations where id = #{id} and user_name = #{userName}
mapper.select: select id, conversation_id as conversationId, role, content, thinking, tool_calls_json as toolCallsJson, tool_call_id as toolCallId, created_at as createdAt from zephyr_messages where conversation_id = #{conversationId} order by created_at asc
mapper.insert: insert into zephyr_messages (id, conversation_id, role, content, thinking, tool_calls_json, tool_call_id, created_at) values (#{id}, #{conversationId}, #{role}, #{content}, #{thinking}, #{toolCallsJson}, #{toolCallId}, #{createdAt})
